chapter_title.en: Prayer of the Sick, the Unconcious, the Weak and the Infirm, the Elderly and Others

text: اَلصَّلاَةِ فِي اَلْمَحْمِلِ «صَلِّ مُتَرَبِّعاً وَ مَمْدُودَ اَلرِّجْلَيْنِ وَ كَيْفَ مَا أَمْكَنَكَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1051 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said regarding prayer in a carriage (mahmil),
"Pray sitting cross-legged (tawarruk), with your legs extended, or in whatever manner is possible for you."
